allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item tmp/docx-verify -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Expand-Archive -Path tmp/test-fixed.zip -DestinationPath tmp/docx-verify -Force; Get-Content tmp/docx-verify/word/document.xml")
